privileged_info_summary: The task.json file is malformed and truncated, entirely omitting its metadata and trailing instructions. The task dynamically provisions exactly 10 real FITS frames from a cached WASP-12b time-series dataset (from University of Louisville) if available, falling back to duplicating a single Hubble Space Telescope sample frame otherwise. Ground truth residual values are computed dynamically at runtime via a Python script. Processing the first 10 WASP-12b FITS files yields an expected max residual of approximately 12511.70 and min residual of -18777.20. If the fallback single HST frame is used, the expected residuals are exactly 0.0.
